```python
class EmailTemplates:
    """
    Generates email templates for recruiter communications.
    """

    @staticmethod
    def interview_invitation_email(candidate_name, job_title, date, time, location, interviewer, additional_info=None):
        """
        Generates an email template for inviting a candidate to an interview.

        :param candidate_name: str
        :param job_title: str
        :param date: str
        :param time: str
        :param location: str
        :param interviewer: str
        :param additional_info: str, optional
        :return: str
        """
        subject = f"Interview Invitation for {job_title} at [Company Name]"
        body = f"""
Dear {candidate_name},

We are pleased to invite you to interview for the {job_title} position at [Company Name].

Based on your qualifications and experience, we believe you could be a great fit for our team.

The interview is scheduled for:

Date: {date}
Time: {time}
Location: {location}
Interviewer: {interviewer}

Please bring a copy of your resume and be prepared to discuss your skills and experience in detail.

{f'Additional Information: {additional_info}' if additional_info else ''}

If the proposed time does not work for you, please let us know as soon as possible so we can reschedule.

We look forward to meeting you.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Company Name]
        """
        return subject, body

    @staticmethod
    def post_evaluation_result_email(candidate_name, job_title, evaluation_summary, recommendation, next_steps=None):
        """
        Generates an email template for communicating post-evaluation results to the candidate.

        :param candidate_name: str
        :param job_title: str
        :param evaluation_summary: str
        :param recommendation: str
        :param next_steps: str, optional
        :return: str
        """
        subject = f"Update on Your Application for {job_title} at [Company Name]"
        body = f"""
Dear {candidate_name},

Thank you for your interest in the {job_title} position at [Company Name] and for taking the time to interview with our team.

We have completed our evaluation process. Here is a summary of our findings:

Evaluation Summary:
{evaluation_summary}

Recommendation:
{recommendation}

{f'Next Steps: {next_steps}' if next_steps else ''}

We appreciate your interest in [Company Name].

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Company Name]
        """
        return subject, body


if __name__ == '__main__':
    # Example Usage:

    # Interview Invitation Email
    subject, body = EmailTemplates.interview_invitation_email(
        candidate_name="John Doe",
        job_title="Python Developer",
        date="October 26, 2023",
        time="10:00 AM",
        location="[Company Name] Office",
        interviewer="Jane Smith",
        additional_info="Please bring your portfolio."
    )
    print("Interview Invitation Email:")
    print("Subject:", subject)
    print("Body:", body)

    # Post-Evaluation Result Email
    subject, body = EmailTemplates.post_evaluation_result_email(
        candidate_name="John Doe",
        job_title="Python Developer",
        evaluation_summary="John demonstrated strong Python skills and problem-solving abilities.",
        recommendation="We are moving forward with the next stage of the interview process.",
        next_steps="You will be contacted soon to schedule a follow-up interview with the hiring manager."
    )
    print("\nPost-Evaluation Result Email:")
    print("Subject:", subject)
    print("Body:", body)
```
